summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for INFRA STORES rebrand (from LMN INFRA). All critical user flows pass: Properties tab fully removed, rebrand consistent across all pages, MaterialsPage compile issue resolved, all product images load correctly (no buildersmart 403s), construction cost estimator math works, contact dropdown clean. No console errors detected.
passed_tests: Navbar: exactly 5 links (Home, Materials, Construction, About, Contact); no Properties link
Logo wordmark reads 'INFRA STORES' on all pages
Hero H1 'Build Smarter. Build Faster. Build with Infra Stores.' present with two CTAs
Home page has Two Pillars (2 vertical cards: Material Delivery + Construction), brand marquee, founders section with Naveen/Rajesh/Parvez
/properties route removed - no property listings render (Navbar+Footer still mount, main content empty as expected since no route)
Materials page: 'Showing 154 products', 22 category pills (incl All), 239 brand text tiles in A-Z directory
Materials category filter works (cat-cement -> 15 products)
Materials search filter works (cement -> 14 products) and clear button works
Request Quote dialog opens, fields fillable (name/phone/quantity/message), Submit via WhatsApp button present
Brand tile click filters catalog (brand-ambuja-cement -> 1 product) and page scrolls up (scrollY=664, not at bottom)
All sampled product images load (15/15 with naturalWidth>0, 0 buildersmart URLs, 0 blank)
No 'Compiled with problems' overlay on MaterialsPage (prior babel/visual-edits crash is fixed)
Construction page: 'Infra Construction' badge present, no 'LMN Constructions'
Cost estimator math correct: 1000 sqft x Basic ₹1850 = ₹1,850,000; Classic = ₹1,950,000; Premium = ₹2,150,000
Get Detailed Quote button present and packages selectable
About page: contains 'Infra Stores' and 'Verticals'; no 'LMN', 'Properties', or 'Property' references in main
Contact page service dropdown options are exactly 4: Material Delivery, Construction Services, Bulk Order Quote, Other - NO 'Property Inquiry'
Floating WhatsApp button is position:fixed and links to wa.me/916301241568 (with prefilled 'Infra Stores' text)
Footer: shows INFRA STORES wordmark via Logo, Quick Links has Material Delivery/Construction/About/Contact (no Properties), copyright 'Infra Stores'
Instagram links: 2 total (1 footer + 1 contact page), both point to @lmn.infra (single account as required)
Zero console errors / pageerrors captured across Home, Materials, Construction, About, Contact
critical_code_review_comments: Footer Instagram href still uses 'instagram.com/lmn.infra' - this matches the requirement of 'Only one Instagram link (@lmn.infra)' but worth double-checking the handle was intentionally kept as @lmn.infra (not @infrastores).

Contact form submit handler likely uses window.open for WhatsApp redirect - in headless Playwright the popup did not register a new page event and no toast text was captured (toast div empty). Manually validate that submitting the contact form on a real browser actually opens wa.me and shows a sonner toast; if user reports broken redirect, inspect the handleSubmit function (likely needs window.open with _blank or location.href fallback).

Navigating to /properties does not return a 404 page - BrowserRouter renders Navbar+Footer with empty main. Consider adding a catch-all <Route path='*'> redirect to '/' or a 404 component for cleaner UX on dead links.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend-only rebrand has been verified end-to-end. All data-testids referenced in the request exist and work. If a regression appears, focus on: (1) MaterialsPage babel/visual-edits compile crash, (2) product image src in /app/frontend/src/data/materialsData.js (must NOT contain buildersmart.in), (3) contact dropdown SelectItems list, (4) construction cost math = sqft * package.price. Use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from frontend/.env (currently https://infra-catalog-demo.preview.emergentagent.com) for testing.
